programmes.show_name: Singapore Hour - All Part of The Plan
programmes.show_description: No further information...
No further information...
A filmmaker discovers a forgotten fashion powerhouse, whose designs in her monthly magazine columns inspired many in the 1960s, and finds an extraordinary life hidden behind the pages of glamour.
17-year-old Doris Young catapulted to fame as 70's B-movie icon Cleopatra Wong, only to vanish from the public eye after just three films. Years later, we witness her comeback, on her own terms.
No further information...
Malaysian Prime Minister, Anwar Ibrahim has launched a new anti-corruption effort, though critics say it is politically motivated. What is behind the corruption crackdown in Malaysia?

Narendra Modi is the country's prime minister for a historic third term.  Yet, the ruling BJP underwhelmed at the polls, falling far short of its 400-seat target. Is Modi Magic over?

programmes.show_name: Undercover Asia S10: Lombok's Poisoned G
programmes.show_description: In Indonesia, informal gold miners are relying on mercury to extract gold from its ore. Fueled by crime and corruption, we reveal how the toxic metal and its illegal trade is poisoning miners slowly.
No further information...

programmes.show_name: Singapore Hour - All Part of The Plan
programmes.show_description: No further information...
A singer untangles the myth behind an artist manager in the 1960s rumoured to have shaped Singapore's pop music golden era through over 3,000 records, revealing a forgotten woman ahead of her time.
No further information...
